message:
fix(sync): zero semaphore permits on close and handle pool close-while-create race

Semaphore: close() now zeroes both state.permits and the permits_shadow
atomic, preventing closed semaphores from advertising reusable capacity.
add_permits() becomes a no-op after close, preventing permit revival.
New tests: close_zeroes_available_permits_and_keeps_them_zero verifies
that dropping held permits after close does not revive capacity,
add_permits_is_noop_after_close verifies the guard.

Pool: commit_create_slot() now returns bool indicating whether the
resource can be handed out. If the pool was closed while creation was
in flight, it returns false and the caller receives PoolError::Closed
instead of handing out a resource from a closed pool. CreateSlotReservation
::commit() propagates this boolean. Metrics recording is conditioned on
the commit result. New test pool_close_while_create_in_flight_returns_
closed uses a blocking factory to simulate the race.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
